deferredReason: DELIVERED (Path A, 2026-06-08): all 16 scenarios are implemented; linkedTests + evidenceRefs below are populated to the REAL delivered unit/integration tests (each verified to exist in the working tree). gherkinHash values are retained from authoring (not recomputed in the RW-056-002-001 structural pass). No scenario claims a live Twitter pass; the real-API 403->200 arm is operator-gated (api_live_test.go) and is intentionally NOT a manifest scenario because it is not CI-runnable. This connector's contract is unit + integration only (no e2e-api row).

scenarios.title: PKCE code_verifier derives the correct S256 code_challenge

gherkin.given: a code_verifier generated from 32 cryptographically-random bytes
gherkin.then: the verifier is 43 base64url-nopad chars from [A-Za-z0-9-._~] and the challenge equals base64url-nopad(SHA-256(ASCII(verifier))) with method S256

scenarios.title: OAuth2 helper speaks PKCE + confidential-client Basic auth (additive; interface unchanged)

gherkin.when: AuthURLWithPKCE builds the authorize URL and ExchangeCodeWithVerifier posts to the token endpoint
gherkin.then: the URL carries code_challenge_method=S256 and the POST sends Authorization: Basic base64(id:secret) + code_verifier in the body (secret omitted from body); the shared OAuth2Provider interface is unchanged

scenarios.title: User-context tokens round-trip through the encrypted store

gherkin.given: a Twitter oauthStore built with a non-empty at-rest key
gherkin.when: an access+refresh token pair is saved and read back
gherkin.then: the persisted columns are AES-256-GCM ciphertext (not equal to the plaintext) and GetTokens decrypts back to the exact original pair

scenarios.title: Encrypted store fails loud on an empty at-rest key (no plaintext fallback)

gherkin.given: the at-rest key (SHA-256 of SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN) is empty
gherkin.then: it returns an error, no store is created, and no refresh token is ever written in plaintext

scenarios.title: OAuth credential config has no hidden default (SST fail-loud)

gherkin.then: the three fields resolve to empty string (no fallback value substituted) and carry their exact env values when set

scenarios.title: authorize-begin starts a PKCE flow and prints the authorize URL

gherkin.given: valid oauth_client_id and oauth_redirect_url are configured
gherkin.then: a verifier+S256 challenge+state are generated, a twitter_oauth_states row is persisted (15-min TTL), the printed URL carries code_challenge_method=S256 and the locked scopes, and empty client config fails loud (no verifier/secret printed)

scenarios.title: authorize-finalize exchanges the code and persists encrypted tokens

gherkin.given: a valid un-expired state token and the operator-pasted authorization code
gherkin.then: the state row is consumed (TTL-checked and DELETED), the code+verifier are exchanged with Basic client auth, the access+refresh pair is persisted AES-256-GCM-encrypted, and only a success line is printed (never a token value)

scenarios.title: authorize-status reports whether a user-context token is persisted

gherkin.then: it reports a valid/refreshable user-context token is present, and before any authorize it reports none is persisted

scenarios.title: User-owned endpoints carry the user-context token, not App-Only

gherkin.given: a persisted, valid user-context access token
gherkin.then: each request carries the user-context access token and NOT the App-Only bearer

scenarios.title: App-Only bearer on a user-owned endpoint is rejected, never silently used (KEY adversarial regression)

gherkin.given: a fixture server that ENFORCES user-context on /2/users/:id/bookmarks and the request is presented with the App-Only sentinel bearer
gherkin.then: the fixture returns 403 'Unsupported Authentication', the connector SURFACES the 403 (errAuthRejected) and never silently succeeds; RED precisely when a user-owned endpoint is routed through App-Only

scenarios.title: Expired/401 user-context token is refreshed once, retried, and the rotated token persisted

gherkin.then: it exchanges the refresh token (Basic auth), re-encrypts and persists the ROTATED pair, retries exactly once, and a second 401 surfaces errAuthRejected (no infinite retry)

scenarios.title: Fail loud when a user-context token is required but absent (ErrUserContextTokenRequired)

gherkin.given: sync_mode api or hybrid is configured to fetch bookmarks/likes/users-me and no user-context token has been persisted
gherkin.when: the connector starts the user-owned fetch
gherkin.then: it fails loud with ErrUserContextTokenRequired naming the authorize remedy and NEVER attaches the App-Only bearer to a user-owned endpoint
it uses the App-Only bearer token unchanged

scenarios.title: User-context tokens never appear in logs

gherkin.given: a user-context fetch and refresh cycle
gherkin.then: neither the access token nor the refresh token appears in any log line

scenarios.title: x-rate-limit-remaining gauge is set after each API call (R-016)

gherkin.given: any Twitter API response carrying x-rate-limit-remaining
gherkin.when: the call completes (the success path of doWithRetry)

scenarios.title: Remaining gauge updates on a non-429 200 (adversarial)

gherkin.given: a 200 response carrying x-rate-limit-remaining and NO 429 ever occurs
gherkin.then: the remaining gauge is still updated; RED if the parse is wired only into the 429 branch
